Home Make a Submission?

Better than sex cake

Beth Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

1 German Chocolate Cake 1- 12 oz jar Caramel ice cream topping 1- 14oz can sweetened condensed milk 1-8oz tub cool whip - thawed 1/2 bag English Toffee bits

Directions

  1. Bake cake according to package directions in 9x13 pan.
  2. While still warm, poke holes with the handle of a wooden spoon.
  3. Pour milk and Caramel sauce over cake and into holes.
  4. When cake is cool, top with whipped topping and sprinkle with toffee bits.
